title: TAC-ZOMBIES
description: Face off against players and waves of the undead, scavenging for resources, crafting deadly weapons and constantly fighting to survive.
body:
This Minecraft modpack is centered around PvP, exploration, powerful weapons, and, of course, surviving hordes of zombies. It features a unique combination of mods like TACZ and LesRaisins Armor, enhancing the zombie-killing experience with advanced combat and survival tools. For an immersive visual experience, mods like Oculus and Distant Horizons are included, providing stunning graphics and long-distance rendering. Whether you're battling other players or exploring the vast, zombie-infested world, this modpack offers intense action and survival challenges

This modpack is meant to be played with the OWZA map:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/open-world-zombie-apocalypse-survival/




credit:
